description: Engineering tokens required by apps/web/scripts/generate-tokens-css.mjs. Figma exports may omit these; tokens:validate checks them before promote.

brand.reason: Leading trim: units-per-em for Profile Pro
Leading trim: cap height for Profile Pro
Leading trim: ascender for Profile Pro
Leading trim: descender for Profile Pro

alias.reason: Light mode secondary button pressed state
Dark mode secondary button pressed state

generatorRefs.reason: themeBlock: nav item active + show-all backgrounds (dark)

engineeringDefaults.leadingTrim: Default true when Figma omits typography.leadingTrim — required for cap-height trim stacks.
engineeringDefaults.textRowGap: Fixed 0.5rem (8dp) — do not alias to space/N; space scale shifts break product-item and position stacks.
